log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster activates Gem Flight! (2 uses remaining)
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 41 necrotic damage. HP: 26/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:14+12=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 fire damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 14/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster activates Gem Flight! (1 uses remaining)
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:19+12=31 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 fire damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
